CONTENT.Career: Schneller made his professional debut for Bayern Munich II in the 3. Liga on 28 November 2020, starting in the away match against Hansa Rostock, which finished as a 0–2 loss.On 23 January 2024, he renewed his contract until 2026 and was sent on loan to 3. Liga club SC Freiburg II for the rest of the season.On 15 July 2024, he joined Regionalliga Bayern club 1. FC Schweinfurt 05 on loan for the 2024–25 season.
CONTENT.External links: Lukas Schneller at DFB (also available in German)Lukas Schneller at kicker (in German)Lukas Schneller – UEFA competition record (archive)Lukas Schneller at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Lukas Konstantin Schneller (born 26 October 2001) is a German professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Regionalliga Bayern club 1. FC Schweinfurt 05, on loan from Bayern Munich II.
